name: Atziri's Promise
explicitMods: Gain 8% of Elemental Damage as Extra Chaos Damage during effect
2% of Chaos Damage Leeched as Life during Effect
Gain 7% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage during effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: "Death needs not your understanding. It needs only your loyalty."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

name: Piscator's Vigil
explicitMods: No Physical Damage
18% increased Attack Speed
29% increased Critical Strike Chance
+376 to Accuracy Rating
Attacks with this Weapon have 100% increased Elemental Damage
Damage with Weapons Penetrates 5% Elemental Resistances
flavourText: "Stone still, amidst the reeds,
breath fogging in the iron cold air.
he sits, he waits, he watches.
A piscatorial vigil, sat by the river,
his cathedral, his patience his unanswered prayer."
- Jojoba Mansell, bard, angler, adventurer

name: The Wise Oak
explicitMods: During Effect, 6% reduced Damage taken of each Element for which your Uncapped Elemental Resistance is lowest
During Effect, Damage Penetrates 8% Resistance of each Element for which your Uncapped Elemental Resistance is highest
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: The summer sun dries the soil and burns the leaves.
The autumn rain extinguishes the flames.
The spring bloom shades the wet earth.
Nature is an eternal tug of war.

name: Solstice Vigil
explicitMods: 37% increased Damage
+67 to maximum Life
Regenerate 8.6 Mana per second
Gain Shaper's Presence for 10 seconds when you kill a Rare or Unique Enemy
Temporal Chains has no Reservation if Cast as an Aura
flavourText: Time, like light, can be refracted into all its myriad colours.
The first shade is beautiful, but the last will drive the unwary insane.

name: Replica Voidwalker
explicitMods: +42 to Dexterity
160% increased Evasion and Energy Shield
30% increased Movement Speed
10% increased Damage taken while Phasing

Celestial Footprints
flavourText: "Test subject was able to walk into the walls of his chamber after breaking a rabbit's neck.
He was not fast enough, however. Suggest we begin excavation to retrieve prototype."

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses a single enemy, increasing the damage they take from projectiles, and making projectiles split when hitting them, to hit other targets around them. You can only have one Mark at a time.

socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: The Taming
explicitMods: +21% to all Elemental Resistances
10% chance to Freeze, Shock and Ignite

43% increased Elemental Damage with Hits and Ailments for
each type of Elemental Ailment on Enemy
flavourText: "Moon after moon did Berek make fools
Of the great and Untamed Three
Until malice for a Brother
Slew the hatred of the Other
And Berek did hunt
Alone and free."
- Berek and the Untamed

name: Darkness Enthroned
explicitMods: Has 1 Abyssal Socket
73% increased Effect of Socketed Abyss Jewels
flavourText: Hold in your hand the darkness
and never will the light blind you.

a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that hit enemies, causing them to gain bonuses while you have resonance of all three elements, and to grant resonance of elements other than the highest one in a hit. There is a maximum of 50 Resonance for each Element. Cannot support triggered skills, instant skills, orb skills, brands, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods:
Hits with Supported Skills for which the highest Damage Type is Elemental cause you to gain 25 Resonance of other Elements per second for 2 seconds
Lose 5 Resonance per second of each Element you are not gaining
Supported Skills deal 3% more Elemental Damage per 5 of lowest Resonance
Supported Skills penetrate 16% Elemental Resistances while each Resonance is at least 25
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Elemental Damage
